diagrams.title: Requirements Validation Process Flow
diagrams.description: A flowchart showing the sequential validation process from initial requirements through various validation checkpoints to final validated requirements.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the multi-stage validation process and show how defects are filtered at each checkpoint, emphasizing that validation is an iterative process rather than a single activity.

diagrams.title: Cost of Defect Multiplier Chart
diagrams.description: A bar chart showing the exponential cost increase when defects are discovered in later phases of development.
diagrams.purpose: To visually demonstrate the economic justification for early requirements validation and motivate investment in validation activities.

diagrams.title: Requirements Traceability Matrix Template
diagrams.description: A matrix template showing requirements mapped to source, design components, and test cases with status indicators.
diagrams.purpose: To show how traceability supports validation by ensuring every requirement has corresponding test coverage and design implementation, identifying gaps before they become defects.
